```{r}
  lim <- case_when(response_base == 'daha' ~ 4,
                    response_base == 'dmha' ~ 10,
                    response_base == 'ha' ~ 10,
                    .default = 4)
  assign(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
         get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_')) + 
           coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, lim), ylim = c(0, lim)))
  print(get(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_')))
}
```

```{r}
test_result_unstrat <- test_result_unstrat %>%
  add_row(get_test_result_row('Everything w.o Event Indicator', response, daterange,
                              test_metrics, event_metrics))
```

#### Leave-one-out spatial tests {.tabset .tabset-pills}
##### With Lag

```{r}
data <- bind_rows(daily_ha_full_train, daily_ha_full_test)
# spatial_cv <- spatial_validation(curr_model, data, 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
# response, daterange, lag = TRUE, weight_max = lag_weight_max)
#saveRDS(spatial_cv, paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv$cv_table
```

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(spatial_cv$cv_plots)) {
  print(spatial_cv$cv_plots[[i]])
}
```

```{r, eval = TRUE}
p<-wrap_plots(spatial_cv$cv_plots[1:14], ncol = 3)
p
```

```{r}
spatial_avg_result <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_avg_result <- spatial_avg_result %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  colMeans(na.rm=TRUE)

spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_avg_result)))
spatial_avg_result
```

```{r}
w <- data %>%
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
spatial_table_w <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  left_join(w, join_by("Monitor"))

spatial_table_w <- spatial_table_w %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_weighted_avg_result <- spatial_table_w %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  summarise(across(!all_of("n") , ~ weighted.mean(.x, n, na.rm = TRUE)))

spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_weighted_avg_result%>%unlist())))

spatial_weighted_avg_result
```

#### Leave-one-out temporal test
```{r}
# temporal_test <- temporal_validation(curr_model, data, 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                     # response, daterange, weight_max = temporal_weight_max)

# saveRDS(temporal_test, paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))
temporal_test <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))

temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  add_row(temporal_test$result)

temporal_test$result
```

```{r}
temporal_test$plot
```

```{r}
dmha_log_full_loeo_plot <- temporal_test$plot
```


#### Fit final model
```{r}
log_dmha_full_xgb <- fit_final_model(curr_model, data, response)
saveRDS(log_dmha_full_xgb, paste0(model_folder, 'log_dmha_full_final.rds'))
```

## HA {.tabset .tabset-pills}
```{r}
response <- 'ha'
transformation <- ifelse(str_detect(response, 'log'), 'log', 'None')
```

### Exclude Event {.tabset .tabset-pills}
#### 80/20 test
```{r echo = T, results = 'hide'}
daterange <- 'excl_dis'
filename <- paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange, '.rds')
assign(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange), readRDS(paste0(model_folder, filename)))
paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange)
```

```{r}
curr_model <- get(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange))
curr_data <- get_curr_data(response, daterange)
curr_X_train <- curr_data$X_train; curr_y_train <- curr_data$y_train
curr_X_test <- curr_data$X_test; curr_y_test <- curr_data$y_test
# Get new model (new variables + weight)
new_model <- fit_new_8020(curr_model, curr_X_train, curr_y_train, weight_max = v8020_weight_max)
```

```{r}
# Feature importance of new model
get_fi_plot(new_model, get_fi_names(response))
```

```{r}
test_metrics <- get_test_metrics(new_model, 
                                 curr_X_test,
                                 curr_y_test,
                                 transformation)
test_pred <- test_metrics$pred
disaster_idx <- get_test_dis_idx(response, daterange)
event_metrics <- get_event_metrics(disaster_idx, test_pred, curr_y_test, transformation)
```

```{r}
assign(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
       get_ovp_plot(curr_y_test, test_pred, BT = transformation == 'log',
                                       disaster_idx))
get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'))
```

```{r}
if (daterange == 'full_unstrat' | !(response  %in% c('daha', 'daha_log'))) {
  response_base <- str_replace(response, '_log', '')
  lim <- case_when(response_base == 'daha' ~ 4,
                    response_base == 'dmha' ~ 10,
                    response_base == 'ha' ~ 10,
                    .default = 4)
  assign(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
         get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_')) + 
           coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, lim), ylim = c(0, lim)))
  print(get(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_')))
}
```

```{r}
test_result <- test_result %>%
  add_row(get_test_result_row('Exclude Event', response, daterange,
                              test_metrics, event_metrics))

negative_pred <- negative_pred %>%
  add_row(tibble_row(Model = 'Exclude Event', 
                     model_response_name = response, 
                     daterange = daterange,
                     'negative' = sum(test_pred < 0)))
```

#### Leave-one-out spatial tests {.tabset .tabset-pills}
##### With Lag

```{r}
data <- bind_rows(hourly_excl_dis_train, hourly_excl_dis_test)
# spatial_cv <- spatial_validation(curr_model, data, 'Exclude Event',
# response, daterange, lag = TRUE, weight_max = lag_weight_max)
#saveRDS(spatial_cv, paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv$cv_table
```

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(spatial_cv$cv_plots)) {
  print(spatial_cv$cv_plots[[i]])
}
```

```{r, eval = TRUE}
p<-wrap_plots(spatial_cv$cv_plots[1:14], ncol = 3)
p
```

```{r}
spatial_avg_result <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_avg_result <- spatial_avg_result %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  colMeans(na.rm=TRUE)

spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Exclude Event',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_avg_result)))
spatial_avg_result
```

```{r}
w <- data %>%
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
spatial_table_w <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  left_join(w, join_by("Monitor"))

spatial_table_w <- spatial_table_w %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_weighted_avg_result <- spatial_table_w %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  summarise(across(!all_of("n") , ~ weighted.mean(.x, n, na.rm = TRUE)))

spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Exclude Event',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_weighted_avg_result%>%unlist())))

spatial_weighted_avg_result
```

#### Leave-one-out temporal test
```{r}
# temporal_test <- temporal_validation(curr_model, data, 'Exclude Event',
                                     # response, daterange, weight_max = temporal_weight_max)

# saveRDS(temporal_test, paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))
temporal_test <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))

temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  add_row(temporal_test$result)

temporal_test$result
```

```{r}
temporal_test$plot
```

### Everything w.o Disaster Indicator {.tabset .tabset-pills}
#### 80/20 test
```{r echo = T, results = 'hide'}
daterange <- 'full_unstrat'
filename <- paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange, '.rds')
assign(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange), readRDS(paste0(model_folder, filename)))
paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange)
```

```{r}
curr_model <- get(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange))
curr_data <- get_curr_data(response, daterange)
curr_X_train <- curr_data$X_train; curr_y_train <- curr_data$y_train
curr_X_test <- curr_data$X_test; curr_y_test <- curr_data$y_test
# Get new model (new variables + weight)
new_model <- fit_new_8020(curr_model, curr_X_train, curr_y_train, weight_max = v8020_weight_max)
```

```{r}
# Feature importance of new model
get_fi_plot(new_model, get_fi_names(response))
```

```{r}
test_metrics <- get_test_metrics(new_model, 
                                 curr_X_test,
                                 curr_y_test,
                                 transformation)
test_pred <- test_metrics$pred
disaster_idx <- get_test_dis_idx(response, daterange)
event_metrics <- get_event_metrics(disaster_idx, test_pred, curr_y_test, transformation)
```

```{r}
assign(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
       get_ovp_plot(curr_y_test, test_pred, BT = transformation == 'log',
                                       disaster_idx))
get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'))
```

```{r}
if (daterange == 'full_unstrat' | !(response  %in% c('daha', 'daha_log'))) {
  response_base <- str_replace(response, '_log', '')
  lim <- case_when(response_base == 'daha' ~ 4,
                    response_base == 'dmha' ~ 10,
                    response_base == 'ha' ~ 10,
                    .default = 4)
  assign(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
         get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_')) + 
           coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, lim), ylim = c(0, lim)))
  print(get(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_')))
}
```

```{r}
test_result_unstrat <- test_result_unstrat %>%
  add_row(get_test_result_row('Everything w.o Event Indicator', response, daterange,
                              test_metrics, event_metrics))

negative_pred <- negative_pred %>%
  add_row(tibble_row(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator', 
                     model_response_name = response, 
                     daterange = daterange,
                     'negative' = sum(test_pred < 0)))
```

#### Leave-one-out spatial tests {.tabset .tabset-pills}
##### With Lag

```{r}
data <- bind_rows(hourly_full_train, hourly_full_test)
# spatial_cv <- spatial_validation(curr_model, data, 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
# response, daterange, lag = TRUE, weight_max = lag_weight_max)
#saveRDS(spatial_cv, paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv$cv_table
```

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(spatial_cv$cv_plots)) {
  print(spatial_cv$cv_plots[[i]])
}
```

```{r, eval = TRUE}
p<-wrap_plots(spatial_cv$cv_plots[1:14], ncol = 3)
p
```

```{r}
spatial_avg_result <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_avg_result <- spatial_avg_result %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  colMeans(na.rm=TRUE)

spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_avg_result)))
spatial_avg_result
```

```{r}
w <- data %>%
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
spatial_table_w <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  left_join(w, join_by("Monitor"))

spatial_table_w <- spatial_table_w %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_weighted_avg_result <- spatial_table_w %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  summarise(across(!all_of("n") , ~ weighted.mean(.x, n, na.rm = TRUE)))

spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_weighted_avg_result%>%unlist())))

spatial_weighted_avg_result
```

#### Leave-one-out temporal test
```{r}
# temporal_test <- temporal_validation(curr_model, data, 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                     # response, daterange, weight_max = temporal_weight_max)

# saveRDS(temporal_test, paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))
temporal_test <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))

temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  add_row(temporal_test$result)

temporal_test$result
```

```{r}
temporal_test$plot
```

## Log HA {.tabset .tabset-pills}
```{r}
response <- 'ha_log'
transformation <- ifelse(str_detect(response, 'log'), 'log', 'None')
```

### Exclude Event {.tabset .tabset-pills}
#### 80/20 test
```{r}
daterange <- 'excl_dis'
filename <- paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange, '.rds')
assign(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange), readRDS(paste0(model_folder, filename)))
paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange)
```

```{r}
curr_model <- get(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange))
curr_data <- get_curr_data(response, daterange)
curr_X_train <- curr_data$X_train; curr_y_train <- curr_data$y_train
curr_X_test <- curr_data$X_test; curr_y_test <- curr_data$y_test
# Get new model (new variables + weight)
new_model <- fit_new_8020(curr_model, curr_X_train, curr_y_train, weight_max = v8020_weight_max)
```

```{r}
# Feature importance of new model
get_fi_plot(new_model, get_fi_names(response))
```

```{r}
test_metrics <- get_test_metrics(new_model, 
                                 curr_X_test,
                                 curr_y_test,
                                 transformation)
test_pred <- test_metrics$pred
disaster_idx <- get_test_dis_idx(response, daterange)
event_metrics <- get_event_metrics(disaster_idx, test_pred, curr_y_test, transformation)
```

```{r}
assign(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
       get_ovp_plot(curr_y_test, test_pred, BT = transformation == 'log',
                                       disaster_idx))
get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'))
```

```{r}
if (daterange == 'full_unstrat' | !(response  %in% c('daha', 'daha_log'))) {
  response_base <- str_replace(response, '_log', '')
  lim <- case_when(response_base == 'daha' ~ 4,
                    response_base == 'dmha' ~ 10,
                    response_base == 'ha' ~ 10,
                    .default = 4)
  assign(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
         get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_')) + 
           coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, lim), ylim = c(0, lim)))
  print(get(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_')))
}
```

```{r}
test_result <- test_result %>%
  add_row(get_test_result_row('Exclude Event', response, daterange,
                              test_metrics, event_metrics))
```

#### Leave-one-out spatial tests {.tabset .tabset-pills}
##### With Lag

```{r}
data <- bind_rows(hourly_excl_dis_train, hourly_excl_dis_test)
# spatial_cv <- spatial_validation(curr_model, data, 'Exclude Event',
# response, daterange, lag = TRUE, weight_max = lag_weight_max)
#saveRDS(spatial_cv, paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv$cv_table
```

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(spatial_cv$cv_plots)) {
  print(spatial_cv$cv_plots[[i]])
}
```

```{r, eval = TRUE}
p<-wrap_plots(spatial_cv$cv_plots[1:14], ncol = 3)
p
```

```{r}
spatial_avg_result <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_avg_result <- spatial_avg_result %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  colMeans(na.rm=TRUE)

spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Exclude Event',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_avg_result)))
spatial_avg_result
```

```{r}
w <- data %>%
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
spatial_table_w <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  left_join(w, join_by("Monitor"))

spatial_table_w <- spatial_table_w %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_weighted_avg_result <- spatial_table_w %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  summarise(across(!all_of("n") , ~ weighted.mean(.x, n, na.rm = TRUE)))

spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Exclude Event',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_weighted_avg_result%>%unlist())))

spatial_weighted_avg_result
```

#### Leave-one-out temporal test
```{r}
# temporal_test <- temporal_validation(curr_model, data, 'Exclude Event',
                                     # response, daterange, weight_max = temporal_weight_max)

# saveRDS(temporal_test, paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))
temporal_test <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))

temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  add_row(temporal_test$result)

temporal_test$result
```

```{r}
temporal_test$plot
```

### Everything w.o Disaster Indicator {.tabset .tabset-pills}
#### 80/20 test
```{r echo = T, results = 'hide'}
daterange <- 'full_unstrat'
filename <- paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange, '.rds')
assign(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange), readRDS(paste0(model_folder, filename)))
paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange)
```

```{r}
curr_model <- get(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', daterange))
curr_data <- get_curr_data(response, daterange)
curr_X_train <- curr_data$X_train; curr_y_train <- curr_data$y_train
curr_X_test <- curr_data$X_test; curr_y_test <- curr_data$y_test
# Get new model (new variables + weight)
new_model <- fit_new_8020(curr_model, curr_X_train, curr_y_train, weight_max = v8020_weight_max)
```

```{r}
# Feature importance of new model
get_fi_plot(new_model, get_fi_names(response))
```

```{r}
test_metrics <- get_test_metrics(new_model, 
                                 curr_X_test,
                                 curr_y_test,
                                 transformation)
test_pred <- test_metrics$pred
disaster_idx <- get_test_dis_idx(response, daterange)
event_metrics <- get_event_metrics(disaster_idx, test_pred, curr_y_test, transformation)
```

```{r}
assign(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
       get_ovp_plot(curr_y_test, test_pred, BT = transformation == 'log',
                                       disaster_idx))
get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_'))
```

```{r}
if (daterange == 'full_unstrat' | !(response  %in% c('daha', 'daha_log'))) {
  response_base <- str_replace(response, '_log', '')
  lim <- case_when(response_base == 'daha' ~ 4,
                    response_base == 'dmha' ~ 10,
                    response_base == 'ha' ~ 10,
                    .default = 4)
  assign(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_'),  
         get(paste(response, daterange, "ovp", sep = '_')) + 
           coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, lim), ylim = c(0, lim)))
  print(get(paste(response, daterange, "subset", lim, "ovp", sep = '_')))
}
```

```{r}
test_result_unstrat <- test_result_unstrat %>%
  add_row(get_test_result_row('Everything w.o Event Indicator', response, daterange,
                              test_metrics, event_metrics))
```
  
#### Leave-one-out spatial tests {.tabset .tabset-pills}
##### With Lag
```{r}
data <- bind_rows(hourly_full_train, hourly_full_test)
# spatial_cv <- spatial_validation(curr_model, data, 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
# response, daterange, lag = TRUE, weight_max = lag_weight_max)
#saveRDS(spatial_cv, paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/spatial_test/spatial_test_wlag', response, '_', daterange,  '_wgt', lag_weight_max, '.rds'))
spatial_cv$cv_table
```

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(spatial_cv$cv_plots)) {
  print(spatial_cv$cv_plots[[i]])
}
```

```{r, eval = TRUE}
p<-wrap_plots(spatial_cv$cv_plots[1:14], ncol = 3)
p
```

```{r}
spatial_avg_result <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_avg_result <- spatial_avg_result %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  colMeans(na.rm=TRUE)

spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_avg_result)))
spatial_avg_result
```

```{r}
w <- data %>%
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())

spatial_table_w <- spatial_cv$cv_table %>%
  left_join(w, join_by("Monitor"))

spatial_table_w <- spatial_table_w %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = mean(c(event_R2, normal_R2), na.rm=TRUE),
         RMSE_mean = mean(c(event_RMSE, normal_RMSE), na.rm=TRUE),
         coef_mean = mean(c(event_coef, normal_coef), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(R2_mean = coalesce(R2_mean, R2),
         RMSE_mean =  coalesce(event_RMSE, RMSE),
         coef_mean =  coalesce(coef_mean, coef))

spatial_weighted_avg_result <- spatial_table_w %>% 
  select(where(~is.numeric(.x))) %>% 
  summarise(across(!all_of("n") , ~ weighted.mean(.x, n, na.rm = TRUE)))

spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  add_row(bind_cols(as_tibble_row(c(Model = 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                    model_response_name = response,
                                    daterange = daterange, lag = TRUE, coordinates = TRUE)),
          as_tibble_row(spatial_weighted_avg_result%>%unlist())))

spatial_weighted_avg_result
```

#### Leave-one-out temporal test
```{r}
# temporal_test <- temporal_validation(curr_model, data, 'Everything w.o Event Indicator',
                                     # response, daterange, weight_max = temporal_weight_max)

# saveRDS(temporal_test, paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))
temporal_test <- readRDS(paste0('../../tests/temporal_test/temporal_test_', response, '_', daterange, '_wgt', temporal_weight_max,'.rds'))

temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  add_row(temporal_test$result)

temporal_test$result
```

```{r}
temporal_test$plot
```

```{r}
ha_log_full_loeo_plot <- temporal_test$plot
```

# XGB Model performances {.tabset .tabset-pills}
## 80/20 Test Result
```{r}
base_test_result <- test_result %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(test_result$Model))) %>%
  select(-transformation, -contains('BT_'))

log_test_result <- test_result %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg'))

base_test_result_unstrat <- test_result_unstrat %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(test_result$Model))) %>%
  select(-transformation, -contains('BT_'))

log_test_result_unstrat <- test_result_unstrat %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg'))
```

```{r}
daterange_order <- c('excl_dis', 'full_unstrat')
response_order <- c('Daily Avg From Hourly Avg', 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg', 'Hourly Avg')

# XGB Plot
top <- base_test_result %>%
  filter(Model=='Exclude Event') %>% 
  # rbind(base_test_result_unstrat %>% filter(Model == 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>%
  rbind(base_test_result_unstrat)  %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base) %>%
  mutate(n = c(rep(nrow(daily_daha_excl_dis_test_Xmat), 2),
               nrow(hourly_excl_dis_test_Xmat),
               rep(nrow(daily_daha_full_test_Xmat), 2),
               nrow(hourly_full_test_Xmat))) %>%
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'n', 'R2', 'RMSE', 'event_R2', 
         'event_RMSE', 'normal_R2', 'normal_RMSE')

bottom <- log_test_result %>%
  filter(Model=='Exclude Event') %>% 
  # rbind(log_test_result_unstrat %>% filter(Model == 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>%
  rbind(log_test_result_unstrat)  %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base) %>%
  mutate(n = c(rep(nrow(daily_daha_excl_dis_test_Xmat), 2),
               nrow(hourly_excl_dis_test_Xmat),
               rep(nrow(daily_daha_full_test_Xmat), 2),
               nrow(hourly_full_test_Xmat))) %>%
  relocate('n', .after = 'daterange') %>%
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'n', 'BT_R2', 'BT_RMSE', 'BT_event_R2', 
         'BT_event_RMSE', 'BT_normal_R2', 'BT_normal_RMSE') %>%
  rename_with(~ gsub("BT_", "", .x, fixed = TRUE))

xgb_result_table <- bind_rows(top,bottom) %>%
  relocate('daterange') %>%
  setNames(c("Time period", "Response", "N", rep(c("R2", "RMSE"), 3)))

xgb_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'pipe', digits = 4, table.attr = "style='width:100%;'") %>%
    pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 3, 'Full' = 2, 'Event' = 2, 'Routine' = 2)) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Spatial leave-one-out Test Results {.tabset .tabset-pills}
### With spatial lag {.tabset .tabset-pills} 
#### Unweighted {.tabset .tabset-pills} 
##### Full time period metrics

```{r}
base_spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

log_spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

top <- base_spatial_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2', 'RMSE', 'event_R2', 
         'event_RMSE', 'normal_R2', 'normal_RMSE')

bottom <- log_spatial_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2', 'RMSE', 'event_R2', 
         'event_RMSE', 'normal_R2', 'normal_RMSE')

spatial_result_table <- bind_rows(top,bottom) %>%
  relocate('daterange') %>%
  setNames(c("Time period", "Response",  rep(c("R2", "RMSE"), 3)))

spatial_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'pipe', digits = 4, table.attr = "style='width:100%;'") %>%
    pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2, 'Event' = 2, 'Routine' = 2)) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

##### Average of Average of event and routine metrics

```{r}
base_spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

log_spatial_test_result <- spatial_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

top <- base_spatial_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2_mean', 'RMSE_mean')

bottom <- log_spatial_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2_mean', 'RMSE_mean')

spatial_result_table <- bind_rows(top,bottom) %>%
  relocate('daterange') %>%
  setNames(c("Time period", "Response",  c("R2", "RMSE")))

spatial_result_table_kable <- spatial_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'latex', digits = 2) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2))

spatial_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'pipe', digits = 4, table.attr = "style='width:100%;'") %>%
    pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2)) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

#### Weighted {.tabset .tabset-pills}
##### Number of left-out-observations per monitor for exclude event model
```{r}
# Number of observations per monitor per date range
excl_dis_data <- bind_rows(daily_ha_train, daily_ha_test) %>%
  filter(!(year == 2021 & month %in% 10:12))

excl_dis_data %>% 
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
```

##### Number of left-out-observations per monitor for full time models
```{r}
bind_rows(daily_ha_train, daily_ha_test) %>% 
  group_by(Monitor) %>%
  summarise(n = n())
```

##### Full time period metrics

```{r}
base_spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

log_spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

top <- base_spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2', 'RMSE', 'event_R2', 
         'event_RMSE', 'normal_R2', 'normal_RMSE')

bottom <- log_spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2', 'RMSE', 'event_R2', 
         'event_RMSE', 'normal_R2', 'normal_RMSE')

spatial_weighted_result_table <- bind_rows(top,bottom) %>%
  relocate('daterange') %>%
  setNames(c("Time period", "Response",  rep(c("R2", "RMSE"), 3)))

spatial_weighted_result_table_kable <- spatial_weighted_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'latex', digits = 2) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2, 'Event' = 2, 'Routine' = 2))

# writeLines(spatial_weighted_result_table_kable, '../figures/spatial_weighted_result_table_kable.tex')

spatial_weighted_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'pipe', digits = 4, table.attr = "style='width:100%;'") %>%
    pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2, 'Event' = 2, 'Routine' = 2)) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

##### Average of Average of event and routine metrics

```{r}
base_spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_weighted_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

log_spatial_weighted_test_result <- spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  filter(lag == TRUE, coordinates == TRUE) %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_weighted_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

top <- base_spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2_mean', 'RMSE_mean')

bottom <- log_spatial_weighted_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'R2_mean', 'RMSE_mean')

spatial_weighted_result_table <- bind_rows(top,bottom) %>%
  relocate('daterange') %>%
  setNames(c("Time period", "Response",  c("R2", "RMSE")))

spatial_result_table_kable <- spatial_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'latex', digits = 2) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2))

spatial_weighted_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'pipe', digits = 4, table.attr = "style='width:100%;'") %>%
    pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 2, 'Full' = 2)) %>%
  kable_styling()
```

## Temporal leave-one-out Test Result
```{r}
small_n_daily <- bind_rows(daily_ha_train, daily_ha_test) %>%
  filter(year == 2021 & month %in% 7:8) %>% nrow()
small_n_hourly <- bind_rows(hourly_train, hourly_test) %>%
  filter(year == 2021 & month %in% 7:8) %>% nrow()


base_temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == '') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(temporal_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

log_temporal_test_result <- temporal_test_result %>%
  mutate(transformation = if_else(str_detect(model_response_name, '_log'), 'Log', '')) %>%
  filter(transformation == 'Log') %>%
  mutate(response_base = case_when(str_detect(model_response_name, 'daha') ~ 'Daily Avg From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'dmha') ~ 'Daily Max From Hourly Avg',
                                   str_detect(model_response_name, 'ha') ~ 'Hourly Avg')) %>%
  arrange(factor(Model, levels = unique(spatial_test_result$Model))) %>%
  mutate(response_base = factor(response_base, levels = response_order),
         daterange = factor(daterange, levels = daterange_order)) %>%
  arrange(daterange, response_base)

top <- base_temporal_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event', 'Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  mutate(n = rep(c(small_n_daily,
                   small_n_daily,
                   small_n_hourly), times = 2)) %>%
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'n', 'R2', 'RMSE')

bottom <- log_temporal_test_result %>%
  # filter(Model %in% c('Exclude Event','Everything w.o Event Indicator')) %>% 
  mutate(n = rep(c(small_n_daily,
                   small_n_daily,
                   small_n_hourly), times = 2)) %>%
  relocate('n', .after = 'daterange') %>%
  select('response_base', 'daterange', 'n', 'R2', 'RMSE')

temporal_result_table <- bind_rows(top,bottom) %>%
  relocate('daterange') %>%
  setNames(c("Time period", "Response", "N", c("R2", "RMSE")))


temporal_result_table %>%
  knitr::kable(format = 'pipe', digits = 4, table.attr = "style='width:100%;'") %>%
    pack_rows(index = c("No Transformation" = 6, "Log Transformation" = 6)) %>%
  pack_rows(index = c("Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3, 
                      "Exclude Event" = 3, "Everything w.o D.I" = 3)) %>%
  add_header_above(c(' ' = 3, 'Small Event' = 2)) %>%
  kable_styling()
```


## Best params
```{r}
bestTune_df <- as_tibble(fit.xgb_daha_full_unstrat$bestTune) %>%
  slice_head(n=0) %>%
  mutate(date= character(),
         response = character())
response_names <- c("daha", "daha_log", "dmha", "dmha_log", "ha","ha_log"  )
dateranges <- c("excl_dis", "full_unstrat")
for (date in dateranges) {
  for (response in response_names) {
    model <- get(paste0('fit.xgb_', response, '_', date))
    bestTune_df <- bestTune_df %>%
      bind_rows(as_tibble(model$bestTune) %>% mutate(date = date, response = response))
  }
}
bestTune_df<-bestTune_df %>% relocate(date, response)
bestTune_df
```
